visualizerParams.title: Permuted Multiples
visualizerParams.description: Find the smallest positive integer x such that 2x, 3x, 4x, 5x, and 6x contain the same digits.
visualizerParams.ghostCode:
def solution() -> int:
    """
    Finds the smallest positive integer x such that x, 2x, 3x, 4x, 5x, 6x
    all contain the same digits in some order.
    """
    x = 1
    while True:
        # Convert digits of x to a sorted list for easy comparison
        digits_x = sorted(str(x))
        
        # Check if multiples have the same sorted digits
        if all(sorted(str(x * i)) == digits_x for i in range(2, 7)):
            return x
            
        x += 1


if __name__ == "__main__":
    print(f"Smallest x: {solution()}")

        # Check if multiples have the same sorted digits

        x += 1

    print(f"Smallest x: {solution()}")
